title: Apply Operations to Make Two Strings Equal
titleCn: 执行操作使两个字符串相等

testcases.input: s1 = "1100011000", s2 = "0101001010", x = 2 Output: 4 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose i = 3 and apply the second operation. The resulting string is s1 = "1101111000". - Choose i = 4 and apply the second operation. The resulting string is s1 = "1101001000". - Choose i = 0 and j = 8 and apply the first operation. The resulting string is s1 = "0101001010" = s2. The total cost is 1 + 1 + 2 = 4. It can be shown that it is the minimum cost possible.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose i = 3 and apply the second operation. The resulting string is s1 = "1101111000". - Choose i = 4 and apply the second operation. The resulting string is s1 = "1101001000". - Choose i = 0 and j = 8 and apply the first operation. The resulting string is s1 = "0101001010" = s2. The total cost is 1 + 1 + 2 = 4. It can be shown that it is the minimum cost possible.

testcases.input: s1 = "10110", s2 = "00011", x = 4 Output: -1 Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
